title: Those Who Are Completely Inexpressive and Those Who Are Super Expressive
overview: Kashiwada is inexpressive and Oota is very expressive.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and the Pool
overview: Oota hopes that the extra tools around the pool will give him the means to shock Kashiwada.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-san and the Gym Storage Room
overview: Getting trapped in the gym storage room might give Oota the chance to get a rise out of Kashiwada.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and a Date
overview: Oota invites Kashiwada to a horror movie hoping to see her freak out. Is it a date?

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and Winter Vacation
overview: Oota tempts fate when his sister becomes aware of his situation with Kashiwada.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun's Memories
overview: Tadokoro ends up in the middle of a three-way standoff between Oota, Tabuchi, and Kashiwada.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and Chocolate
overview: It's Valentines Day, but does Kashiwada have anything for Oota?

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and Lies
overview: Oota has devised a perfect plan to scare Kashiwada: invite her to his house while the two of them are alone.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and the New School Term
overview: A new classmate joins the class who might actually understand how Kashiwada is feeling.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and Rain
overview: Caught in the rain, Kashiwada gets sick, which leads to an encounter between Oota and her brother.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and Memories
overview: Kashiwada, Oota, and their friends head to the beach, with Oota's sister tagging along to cause trouble.

title: Kashiwada-san and Oota-kun and the Summer Festival
overview: After some competitive bug-hunting, Kashiwada and Oota head to the beach with their friends.
